$comment: Pre-drafted Wikidata new-item structures for mowsenter to create after warmup. Goal: one safe SEO link from Wikidata to rrmacademy.org (Brian's stated goal 2026-05-01). Strategy: two purely additive items, no edits to NaPro Q23815908 or any other contested item. All QIDs verified live via Special:EntityData on 2026-05-01.
$gate: Sitting 5 + Sitting 6 must complete first; account must have ~22+ edits across mixed types before either item is created.

Q136663845.label: International Institute for Restorative Reproductive Medicine
Q136663845.note: IIRRM already exists on Wikidata. Has P31:Q163740 (nonprofit), P571 (inception 2000), P856 (iirrm.org), P6782 ROR 02ph6p167, P17 country UK. Reference asset for both new items below.

$primary_documentary_evidence.comment: Both PDFs supplied by Brian on 2026-05-01 are public records suitable as Wikidata references and ROR application supporting documents.

pa_articles_of_incorporation.filed_with: Pennsylvania Department of State, Bureau of Corporations and Charitable Organizations
pa_articles_of_incorporation.stated_purpose: To foster and spread Restorative Reproductive Medicine principles to the public and healthcare industry.
pa_articles_of_incorporation.incorporator_address: 3401 Hartzdale Dr Ste 103B PMB 3518, Camp Hill, PA 17011
pa_articles_of_incorporation.registered_office: Rocket Lawyer Corporate Services LLC, Dauphin County

propublica_nonprofit_explorer.comment: ProPublica mirrors IRS Form 990 filings as public data. Direct, citable, durable URL — strongest single-link reference for any Wikidata claim about RRM Foundation.

items.$comment_label_case: Wikidata convention is lowercase for common nouns and concept terms; keep the abbreviation 'RRM' in aliases not labels.
items.description_en: branch of medicine that diagnoses and treats the underlying causes of reproductive dysfunction

references.comment: IIRRM defines RRM as a medical specialty; IIRRM itself is Q136663845 on Wikidata
RRM Academy pillar guide — primary source for SEO backlink goal
self-anchor; subclass relationship justified by overlapping clinical scope

claims.$comment: PRIMARY SEO LINK. P973 is the entity-level URL property Google KG ingests for canonical entity description.

qualifiers.P407_label: language of work or name: English

$do_not_add_yet: P361 (part of) → IIRRM Q136663845 — defer to later edit, not part of initial creation, to keep first revision clean and minimal

items.description_en: online educational platform for restorative reproductive medicine

targets.label: nonprofit organization
targets.$comment: Inherits from operating-brand status under RRM Foundation Inc, which is a 501(c)(3) confirmed via ProPublica EIN 93-4594315

references.comment: ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer — public IRS Form 990 data confirming 501(c)(3) status of parent foundation

claims.$comment: PRIMARY SEO LINK FOR THIS ITEM. P856 is the canonical org-website property Google KG ingests as authoritative.

qualifiers.P407_label: language of work or name: English

claims.$comment_precision: 9 = year-only precision per Wikibase time-value spec
claims.source: ecosystem JSON timeline: 'RRM Academy launched on Wix' (2022)

claims.$comment: Operates from RRM Foundation's HQ (Camp Hill, PA). RRM Academy is a virtual platform but the operating brand inherits the parent foundation's physical HQ.

Use snaktype:somevalue + qualifier P1448 (official name) string, OR defer this claim until RRM Foundation has its own Wikidata item. Safer: use P1454 (legal form) instead with target Q5697166 (501(c)(3) organization) or similar.

$do_not_add_yet: P749 (parent organization): RRM Foundation needs its own Wikidata item first. Defer.
P6782 (ROR ID): pending — see ROR discussion in spec footer.

creation_workflow.1_login: Same auto-login pattern as Sitting 4 (1P item fqgsa6aibyhdmyvuy4im6yhuvm, submit #wpLoginAttempt)
creation_workflow.2_pre_check_no_duplicate: Run wbsearchentities for each item label. If Wikidata already has an item (e.g., someone else created RRM in the meantime), abort and reassess.
creation_workflow.3_create_item: API call: action=wbeditentity, new=item, data={labels, descriptions, aliases, claims}
creation_workflow.4_verify: GET Special:EntityData/Q[new]/json, confirm P31 + P973/P856 + references all present
creation_workflow.5_log: Capture new QID for memory + plan files

risk_register.likelihood: low for specialty item, low-medium for org item
risk_register.mitigation: WD:N criterion 2 (clearly identifiable entity describable via serious public references). Specialty: JRRM, IIRRM, board-cert track. Org: ProPublica IRS data, parent foundation 501(c)(3), ROR if obtainable.

risk_register.risk: Patroller adds P31:Q2717322 (natural family planning) to RRM specialty item
risk_register.likelihood: low — RRM is not NFP and item description makes that clear
risk_register.mitigation: If happens, leave the contested claim for later resolution; do not edit war

risk_register.risk: Item gets merged into NaPro item by a patroller who sees them as same topic
risk_register.likelihood: low — RRM is the broader specialty, NaPro is a specific protocol within it; not the same scope
risk_register.mitigation: Item description distinguishes scope clearly. If merged anyway, the SEO link migrates to NaPro and that's still a backlink to rrmacademy.org.

alternative_simpler_path.$comment: If both new items feel like too much surface area, the absolute-minimum path is to add P973 (described at URL) → rrmacademy.org/what-is-rrm/ to an EXISTING item where the addition is taxonomically defensible. Candidates: Q23815908 (NaPro) — risky due to watcher set; Q3069771 (Creighton Model) — might survive as an external resource. Single-edit, no new-item creation.
alternative_simpler_path.$tradeoff: Less SEO surface than dedicated items, but zero new-item-notability risk.
